strengths: Proven full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js equivalents, with direct experience building end-to-end enterprise tooling at re:cinq and Optilyz.
Deep hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the required AI agent development skill in the job description.

Demonstrated architectural versatility through open-source projects (GISCollective) and multi-language contributions (DLang, Java, Kotlin-equivalent), showing ability to pick the right tool and contribute to scalable, containerized systems on Kubernetes.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Vitest or Jest in resume, though testing expertise is shown via Fluent-Asserts, Trial, and Selenium workshops.
No direct evidence of Nest.js or PostgreSQL/MySQL usage in current or recent roles, though Node.js and database experience is extensive.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may pose minor communication challenges in a Berlin-based enterprise team.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 6+ years of full-stack engineering, direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, and consistent delivery of scalable, containerized systems using Node.js, TypeScript, and Kubernetes align strongly with the role’s core requirements; his open-source leadership, testing rigor, and multi-language adaptability further demonstrate the architectural maturity and user-focused delivery the position demands.
